proposedBehaviors.summary: Set has_key after the key pickup event.
proposedBehaviors.expectedScenarioImpact: collect-and-exit scenario reaches exit after key pickup

proposedBehaviors.summary: Gate exit transition on the has_key flag.
proposedBehaviors.expectedScenarioImpact: exit transition is blocked before key pickup and allowed after pickup

rationale: Behavior draft links runtime assertion evidence to a reviewable untrusted proposal.
guardrails: Draft is untrusted and inert until review-gated apply.
No arbitrary scripts, eval, dynamic imports, plugin loader, command bridge, browser trusted writes, auto-apply, or auto-merge.
